description: Clean and rescue customer transaction data from a dying POS system. Deduplicate customers, standardize formats, calculate customer lifetime value, and identify VIP customers (top 20% by spending). Save the processed dataset to /home/ga/Documents/cleaned_transactions.csv.

natural_language.prompt: A small business needs to migrate customer data from an old POS system. The exported CSV is messy with duplicate customers, mixed date formats, and inconsistent currency formatting. Clean the data, identify VIP customers (top 20% by spending), and prepare it for the new system.
